pi_items.source: export_result.sh lines 18-24 explicitly check for this exact output file path.
export_result.sh dumps ground truth data by explicitly iterating over the ^DPT global variables to identify patients.
export_result.sh dumps ground truth data by explicitly looking up disability string names from the ^DIC(31) global.
export_result.sh dumps ground truth data by explicitly indexing the .372 node under each patient's ^DPT record.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated VistA VEHU database containing training patient records. The required patient disability data is reliably stored in the patient global ^DPT under node .372, which cross-references the disability global ^DIC(31) for human-readable condition names. The final report is explicitly evaluated against the path /home/ga/Documents/disability_audit.txt.
